text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day of summer camp, but
Matikanetannhauser is nowhere to be found. I
search high and low for her, until...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Is it that late already?! Sorry! I was just
looking for something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Just some things I found yesterday but forgot to
bring back with me. Oh, where are they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a row of several spider
conches.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, they're seashells shaped like spiders! They're
so cute and spiky!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's use them to decorate your office! They
can remind us of this summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All things considered, this year's summer camp
comes to a close with Matikanetannhauser in high
spirits.
